title: Pour the Bounce — Satisfying Cascade
hook_3s: A stream of glowing amber balls pours from above into a dark purple grid — they bounce, chain, and erupt into a satisfying clear.
scene_flow: 0–3s HOOK: Top-down on a near-full Bounce Blast grid (deep navy + purple frames). A single tap drops a yellow-orange block — it instantly transforms into a stream of bouncing balls pouring in like granules into a jar.
3–7s ESCALATION: Balls cascade across the grid, ricocheting off purple obstacles. Each hit pops with a soft amber flash; a counter ticks up: 12… 47… 113 BLOCKS CLEARED.
7–11s PAYOFF: The final ball triggers a chain reaction — golden ripple sweeps the board, obstacles shatter into light, grid empties to a clean glow. Level meter fills to 100%.
11–14s LOOP TEASE: Camera pulls back to reveal Level 2 sliding in with a tougher layout — one tap teases the next pour.
14–15s CTA card: logo + 'Tap to Pour' button pulsing in accent yellow.
visual_direction: Lean fully into the game's native DNA: matte #20232B backdrop with deep #403F6D rounded UI frames and grid cells, lit only by warm #FDBA4D balls that act as the single light source. 3D Casual Abstract render — soft global illumination, gentle depth-of-field, chunky low-poly blocks with subtle bevels. Borrow the archetype's ASMR pacing (slow pour-in → granular fill → satisfying settle) but translate "pour" as a luminous ball-cascade and "jar" as the puzzle grid. Camera stays mostly top-down with one slow dolly for the chain-reaction payoff. No characters, no UI clutter — pure tactile, satisfying physics.
rationale: We keep the proven ASMR "satisfying pour-and-fill" pacing that drove the archetype's win, but re-skin it 1:1 to Bounce Blast's native palette and core loop so users see exactly the game they'll download — protecting IPM and D1. The amber-ball cascade against the dark purple grid gives us a high-contrast, thumb-stopping hero frame that reads instantly on muted autoplay. UA: test against a "messy grid → one-tap clear" variant; expect best performance on Facebook/TikTok feeds targeting 25–55 casual puzzle women.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, top-down 3D Casual Abstract render of a dark moody puzzle grid with deep purple #403F6D rounded cell frames on a matte #20232B background, a luminous stream of glowing amber #FDBA4D spheres pouring from the top of the screen and cascading into the grid like granules filling a jar, soft motion blur on the falling balls, warm rim light, gentle depth-of-field, on-screen text 'No. 001 — POUR THE BOUNCE' in clean bold sans-serif at the top, ASMR satisfying mood, no characters, mobile ad still

Storyboard frame 2, aspect 9:16, 3D Casual Abstract slightly tilted top-down view of a puzzle board mid chain-reaction, dozens of #FDBA4D bouncing balls ricocheting between deep #403F6D purple blocks on a #20232B dark background, golden light trails and soft amber glow flashes where balls impact, particles of broken obstacles dissolving into sparks, on-screen overlay text 'CHAIN REACTION x8' in glowing yellow-orange, calm satisfying mobile game ad aesthetic

Storyboard frame 3, aspect 9:16, 3D Casual Abstract top-down of a now-empty puzzle grid bathed in a warm golden #FDBA4D ripple of light, deep purple #403F6D frame edges fading into a #20232B black background, a single last amber ball settling at center, a thin progress bar fully filled in accent yellow, on-screen text 'LEVEL COMPLETE' in crisp white sans-serif, clean satisfying payoff shot for a mobile puzzle ad
